message:
You know that one friend who panics at the slightest sign of a storm? Yep, I have one of those too! Last winter, when the weather report hinted at a big snowstorm, she started texting me about all the things we needed to do. I could practically hear her pacing in the background! 

While I appreciate her enthusiasm, I had to chuckle. I had already stocked up on groceries and made sure our flashlights were working. So, I reassured her that we were ready for whatever the weather threw our way. 

It reminded me that preparation can be calm and collected, even if some folks prefer the drama! If there's one thing I've learned, it's that a little advance planning goes a long way in keeping the peace during unpredictable weather. 

Anyone else have a friend who brings the drama when it storms? What do you do to keep things chill?
